audio_identity.overall_style: diverse stylistic range incorporating modern Americana themes
distinctive_elements: seamless world music without overworld map separation

notes: Documentation sources contained minimal specific audio parameters. Wikipedia confirms composers Keiichi Suzuki and Hirokazu Tanaka incorporated diverse musical styles (salsa, reggae, dub) but provides no tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX data. Data Crystal, TASVideos, and TCRF sources focused on ROM structure, technical glitches, graphics, and gameplay mechanics rather than musical analysis. No area-specific music documentation, track names, tempos, keys, or SFX characteristics were found in provided sources.
